task_completion.description: Create a Purchase Invoice for the CNC Milling Machine from Eagle Hardware.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the ERPNext Purchase Invoice form showing 'Eagle Hardware' as the Supplier, 'CNC Milling Machine' in the items table, and a rate/amount of $48,000.
Screenshot showing the Purchase Invoice status as 'Unpaid' or 'Submitted' (no longer in 'Draft' status).

task_completion.description: Locate the auto-created draft Asset and update its Location and Dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Asset form showing the Location set to 'Main Factory', the 'Available-for-use Date' filled in, and the 'Depreciation Start Date' in the Finance Books section filled in.

task_completion.description: Submit the Asset to generate its depreciation schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Asset status as 'Submitted' or 'Active' (not 'Draft') and/or showing the generated depreciation schedule table.

task_completion.description: Create an Asset Movement to transfer the machine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Asset Movement form showing the correct Asset selected, Source Location as 'Main Factory', and Target Location as 'Production Floor'.
Screenshot showing the Asset Movement status as 'Submitted' (not 'Draft').

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ERPNext graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ERPNext web interface in a browser, not just terminal windows or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI for core tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of python scripts, curl commands, or direct database queries in the terminal used to create or submit the invoices, assets, or movements.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely entered data into the forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or selecting values in dropdowns within the ERPNext forms, rather than just displaying a final success message or text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Supplier: 'Eagle Hardware'. Item: 'CNC Milling Machine'. Expected Purchase Invoice amount: $48,000. Source Location for asset: 'Main Factory'. Target Location for asset movement: 'Production Floor'.
